creator: yds@dppl.com
text:
I updated my FreeBSD port of Courier MTA to work with the latest available 
version, courier-0.36.0.20011118.  This supersedes any of my previous 
submissions.  The port tarball can be fetched from 
http://yds.dppl.com/courier/

I'm looking for feedback from anyone who is willing to give this port a 
spin.  I'm running FreeBSD 4.4-STABLE.  Works well enough for me to use it 
on two production systems.  Install and deinstall work very cleanly.

I'm also looking for any FreeBSD committer to look it over and hopefully 
commit this to CVS.

-- 
Yarema
